goal: Add a side-effect-free approved-action preflight builder for approved release-governance authority decisions while keeping merge, external actions, GitHub, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not merge, create PRs, call GitHub, perform external actions, call providers, call DB, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Approved release-governance authority decisions can be preflighted for approved action without merging or external action.
Preflight, executor, and action policy refs are required.
Merge and external actions remain false.
assumptions: Actual action execution, PR work, and merge require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing preflight ref, and deferred decision cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Merge, PR creation, GitHub calls, external actions, DB, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-106 approved release-governance authority decisions without merge or external action.
